narrative:
Turtlecreek Twp M (precinct in Warren County) has 1,107 registered voters, with 50.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.7 percentage points.
